overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a dark rural landscape at night. The character moves steadily along a grassy path surrounded by dense forest, approaching and passing a wooden hut with a warm glowing window.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest clearing path at night

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a grassy path through a dark forest clearing surrounded by dense trees

entered.detail: dark silhouette of tall pine trees forming the horizon boundary
narrow winding trail through the clearing with patches of grass and dirt
dark teal night sky visible above the tree line

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest clearing at night, with the character walking forward along a narrow grassy path. Dense trees form a dark silhouette on the horizon against a teal night sky, creating a moody, isolated atmosphere with no other visible structures or characters.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching rustic wooden hut with warm light source

events.description: wooden hut with glowing orange window emerges from the darkness on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path toward a large tree stump, passing the wooden hut on the left side

entered.detail: small rustic wooden cabin with a warm orange light glowing from the window and smoke rising from the roof
simple wooden fence posts surrounding the hut area
massive dark tree stump or rock formation directly ahead on the path

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, a wooden hut with a warm glowing window becomes visible on the left, introducing the first artificial light source in the scene. The character continues walking past the hut and approaches a large tree stump in the center of the path, while the forest tree line shifts to dominate the right side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, isolated forest that gradually introduces a flicker of warmth and civilization. It begins in a moody clearing at night, following the character as they walk along a narrow grassy path beneath a teal sky and silhouetted trees. As the character progresses, the oppressive darkness shifts with the appearance of a wooden hut on the left, its glowing window casting the first warm light into the scene. The camera then continues past the dwelling, moving toward a large tree stump in the center of the path while the dense forest tree line shifts to dominate the right side of the frame.
